risk_classification.plain_language: The Claims Triage Model is classified as high-risk because it assesses creditworthiness and insurance risk, which can have significant impacts on individuals.

eu_ai_act_obligations.summary: High-risk AI systems shall be tested for the purpose of identifying the most appropriate and targeted risk management measures.
High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.

eu_ai_act_obligations.requirement: Classification rules for high-risk AI systems
eu_ai_act_obligations.summary: An AI system referred to in Annex III shall be considered to be high-risk where it poses a significant risk of harm to the health, safety or fundamental rights of natural persons.

nist_rmf_mapping.outcome: Policies and procedures are in place to define and differentiate roles and responsibilities for human-AI configurations and oversight of AI systems.
suggested_actions: Establish policies and procedures that define and differentiate the various human roles and responsibilities when using, interacting with, or monitoring AI systems.

nist_rmf_mapping.outcome: Treatment of documented AI risks is prioritized based on impact, likelihood, and available resources or methods.
suggested_actions: Prioritize risk treatment based on impact, likelihood, and available resources or methods.

nist_rmf_mapping.outcome: Risk tracking approaches are considered for settings where AI risks are difficult to assess using currently available measurement techniques or where metrics are not yet available.
suggested_actions: Establish processes for tracking emergent risks that may not be measurable with current approaches.

cross_framework_checklist.implementation_action: Develop and implement a risk management system that prioritizes risk treatment based on impact, likelihood, and available resources or methods, and considers risk tracking approaches for settings where AI risks are difficult to assess.
Establish policies and procedures for record-keeping and ensure that high-risk AI systems technically allow for the automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.

cross_framework_checklist.eu_requirement: Classification rules for high-risk AI systems [Art. 6]
cross_framework_checklist.implementation_action: Not addressed in retrieved sources — manual review recommended.
